name: Durability
intent: Add checkpoint/resume infrastructure, pause step type, keybinding-initiated pause, and auto-detection of incomplete runs.

success_criteria.criterion: Incomplete runs detected and offered for resume
Resume skips completed steps, re-runs failed steps
pause: step type creates deliberate pause points
Ctrl+H pauses after current step, Ctrl+J resumes

specs.name: Checkpoint and Resume
specs.intent: Infrastructure for finding incomplete runs and computing resume points

specs.name: Resume UX and Demo
specs.intent: User-facing resume: auto-detect, /workflow resume, TUI indicators

specs.name: Pause and Resume
specs.intent: Workflow-authored pause steps and keybinding-initiated pause
acceptance_criteria: pause: step returns completed, executor sets status=paused
